data.body: COMPLETION EVIDENCE: Landed on main via Gerrit change 562 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/562), commit 0a6bea0e4, MERGED 2026-07-12 with LLM-Review +1 (rebar review bot, PASS, 1 non-blocking advisory) and Verified +1 (rebar CI bot, SUCCESS: https://github.com/navapbc/rebar/actions/runs/29182611232 — the make lint/typecheck/test gate; satisfies the three CI-gate ACs). Defaults flipped: VerifyConfig.remediation_mode=True (_config_schema.py:264 area) + VerifyConfig.novelty_drop_active=True (:282 area); completion_floor_active untouched (False). Both new tests landed: test_default_config_enables_remediation_explicit_false_backs_out (tests/unit/test_plan_review_remediation_gate.py) and test_default_verifyconfig_activates_floor_explicit_false_backs_out (tests/unit/test_code_review_region_gate.py); stale assertions flipped and test_config_defaults_off_and_60_minutes renamed to test_config_defaults_on_and_60_minutes. Rule-based sweep grep run at implementation time: zero residual default-OFF claims (remaining hits are the dated ADR history notes in adr/0002, adr/0008, adr/0037 + correct default-ON prose). docs/config.md, docs/plan-review-gate.md (incl. operator-authorization note), docs/review-kernel.md updated.
